target: Ah... my head is splitting...! Hiruko's presence...!
I see...!! Shinpei can feel the presence of shadows now too.
Mother is constantly sending out a signal to control shadows...
When I was modified by my sister and stopped being controlled... Mother's voice, which had been comforting until then, turned into an incredibly unpleasant sound.
Since I'm a shadow, I can erase just that discomfort from my senses, but there's nothing Shin-chan, a human, can do...
I'm fine, just focus on my presence!
(The ringing in my ears... is getting quiet...)
My sister is canceling out Mother's signal. ...How is she able to do that!?
Punch. Punch it as many times as you want! I'll smash it, wall and all...!!
...That's a good plan. But before that... you ready...?
Ryunosuke-san will foresee movements 2 seconds ahead. Follow my line of sight.
...Deploying her hair at super speed to create a barrier!! Her reach has grown significantly compared to before her revival...!!
My attacks aren't hitting at all!?
(He's seeing right through them!! Ushio's movements!)
(Haine!! So you've come out from the shrine grounds!!)
(...As long as she's foreseeing us, Ryunosuke-san's 2-second precognition won't be a decisive blow...)
(Even if he foresees it and tells us, it'll be observed and dodged...!!)
(He should have experienced the terror of Ushio's blade firsthand in the battle at sea. If it hits, even Shide will suffer a fatal wound!)
(That's why both Shide and Haine have no choice but to focus on our movements...!!)
(So without them noticing, subtly, very naturally...)
(I'll lure Haine into the kill zone...!!)
Your killing intent is leaking everywhere... Mio.
I have a full grasp of the positions of all shadows.
There's another one hiding behind the rock, isn't there! The presence of the nail gun's shadow gives it completely away!
(The shadow presence Haine sensed... was a decoy nail gun printed by Ushio!)
(What Sou had was the real nail gun, not a shadow! Haine couldn't notice its presence!)
(Everything up to here has gone according to plan! Now--)
Now you can no longer tell him our movements 2 seconds in the future!
I told you... Don't think you can act so high and mighty forever!
Haine... you want to go home, right...?
If you return to your hometown, there's no flow of time, so you won't have to perish.
In an eternal world, together with your family and the person you love most, forever...
It'd be nice if you could live like that forever...
...But, sorry. We can't understand each other.
It's disappearing... The mud... the armor Haine gave me...
If Mother dies... the shadows will disappear...
Even though... we beat the bad guys... Even though... it's over now...
We're not disappearing... neither me, nor my sister...!! Mother is still alive...!!
(From my... right eye and... Ushio's right eye... This presence is--)
Why is he still moving!? We definitely killed both of the people inside Shide!!
Ahaha! I really thought it was checkmate, Shinpei-kun!
(...What Shide is holding in his arms is...!)
Haine... no, Hiruko. You're just trash now...
You've become so small... Recovery is hopeless now...
Your eyes were destroyed too... Even if I let you eat e~~veryone on this island, your power won't return...
No, really, I was disappointed from the bottom of my heart earlier.
But how about that... that right eye!!
That's the observer's right eye!! You really are the "egg"...!! It has just awakened!!!
I thought you were growing steadily, but it's exactly because you're like that that you could be restored.
Ahahahahahahahahaha! Is this the so-called power of love!!?
If I take that eye from you, my wish will still come true!!!
I can... still... do it...! If I eat... a lot of people, I'll get... better...!!
I'll get better... and we'll... go home... together...?
What's with that...!! Haine is... your mother, right...
So what? I have no interest in the past.
You!! And you call yourself human!!!
But I still need Hiruko to stay alive...
If Hiruko dies, my armor, and Ushio-chan's newly awakened eye... will all disappear.
As you wished, I'll take you back to your hometown...
W-... With a body... like this... If I... go... back--
(Ryunosuke-san, jump with all your might!! I don't care what happens to my body...!! I don't want to let him get away!!)
What is this!!? I'm getting... sucked into the hole!!
No, Shinpei!! You'll get pulled in!!
If you enter, you won't be able to leave... or even die, you'll just get lost!!!
From here on, I'll go alone!!
Idiot!! I'll never leave you alone again!!!
Idiot!! Were you listening!? You stubborn fool!!!
Ryu-kun!! You can hear me, right!? Move Shinpei's body and run!
...It's... too late... Shide won't let us escape.
If I abandon you here... my sister will beat me up in the afterlife.
I've decided. My sister's promise to definitely save you. I'll fulfill it in her place...!!
I'll support Shinpei-san! I absolutely won't let him get lost!!
...I'll follow your presence. I'll always be... by your side, Ushio...!!
I love Ushio. I want to be with the person I love, you got a problem with that?
